internal_issues.description: WIN-047/048/054/055 sub_rationale values all contain dead pointer to unbuilt cosmological-cluster section (V51.0 Cosmological Expansion overview). Same issue fixed in WIN-052 this run. All four have audit-trail-only sub_rationale values. Public risk: zero (not rendered). Fix: drop pointer from each.

WIN-052 horizon-analogy defense (defense_survives=3): curmudgeon recommends preempting the 'firmament as observable boundary, not hard physical boundary' framing. Two-horn rebuttal: (a) lambda_A=4,283 Mpc is a positive cosmological-scale parameter, not silence; (b) firmament_height=9,086 km is invoked as hard boundary in WIN-029/WIN-053 — cannot be soft for galaxies. Needs analyst EXP to draft paragraph for detail_verdict_text.

patches_applied.description: MAJOR fix: '10^6' ratio claim replaced with '10^12 to 10^14' range (1 kpc/20015 km to 100 kpc/20015 km). Old text understated dimensional mismatch by 6-8 orders of magnitude. Fix strengthens SC verdict.

Closing sentence fixed: '40,030 km disc diameter' and '1-10 kpc' replaced with '20,015 km / 9,086 km bounded firmament' and '1-100 kpc'. Fixes both the 1-10 kpc inconsistency (hole #1) and the radius/diameter framing mix (hole #4) in one patch.
Removed dead pointer to unbuilt cosmological-cluster section (V51.0 Cosmological Expansion overview). Field remains audit-trail-only with standalone rationale text.
Bonus patch: 'a million times larger' (consistent with old 10^6 claim) replaced with 'trillions of times larger (10^12 to 10^14 times)' for consistency with detail_evidence fix.

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Our WIN-052 review understated the galaxy-scale mismatch by a trillion-fold
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: A curmudgeon audit of WIN-052 (Radial Acceleration Relation) found our detail_evidence claimed the dome is 'roughly a million times' smaller than RAR scales — off by 6 to 8 orders of magnitude. The actual ratio is 10^12 to 10^14. Fixing this error substantially strengthens the Self-Contradicted verdict: the structural incoherence is not merely dramatic, it is literally incomprehensible at dome scales.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: The error was in the direction that weakened our own argument. Correcting it makes a SC verdict materially more airtight — a notable self-correction that demonstrates methodological honesty.
